title: jatropha sellowiana
intro: Jatropha sellowiana, also known as the physic nut or Sellow's jatropha, is a plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family, native to the Americas. The plant contains a milky sap that has been used in traditional medicine, which is rich in medicinal compounds such as alkaloids and glycosides, offering various health benefits. The medicinal properties of Jatropha sellowiana include anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Jatropha sellowiana include infusions, tinctures, and creams, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including wounds, burns, and skin conditions.
